---
title: "Group Design Project"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
canvas:
  type: assignment
  published: true
  points: 30
  grading_type: letter_grade
  submission_types: [online_upload]
  allowed_extensions: [pdf, zip]
  group_set: "MECH201 Project Groups"
  due_at: "2026-10-15T23:59:00Z"
---

# Group Design Project

In groups, design a cantilever bracket that safely carries a tip load of
$P = 5\ \text{kN}$ with a factor of safety of at least $n = 2.5$.

## Design Constraint

The maximum bending stress must satisfy

$$
\sigma_{\max} = \frac{M c}{I} \le \frac{\sigma_y}{n}.
$$

| Deliverable | Weight |
|:------------|-------:|
| CAD model | 40% |
| Stress report | 40% |
| Reflection | 20% |

Submit one `.pdf` report and a `.zip` of CAD files **per group**.
